message:
🐛 Add shift+click multi-select to guide view (#94)

The guide view (_showGuideView=true) was using a plain onTap that
always called _selectChannel. Added shift/cmd modifier detection
and multi-select toggle to the guide view's GestureDetector.
Also added checkbox indicators and highlight for selected channels.
Debug logging to /tmp/click_debug.log for both views.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
